query:
SELECT 
  u.email,
  s.id as service_id,
  s.name as service_name,
  LENGTH(s.targetCustomer) as tc_len,
  LEFT(s.targetCustomer, 100) as tc_preview,
  LENGTH(s.painPoints) as pp_len,
  LENGTH(s.falseBeliefsVsRealReasons) as fb_len,
  LENGTH(s.failedSolutions) as fs_len,
  LENGTH(s.hiddenReasons) as hr_len
FROM services s
JOIN users u ON s.userId = u.id
WHERE u.email = 'zaptest+fresh@gmail.com'
ORDER BY s.id DESC
LIMIT 1;
